query:
DELETE FROM tv_ideas WHERE (
  -- 加密货币
  LOWER(title) REGEXP 'bitcoin|btcusd|btcusdt|\\bbtc\\b|ethereum|\\beth\\b|crypto|altcoin|defi|nft|binance|coinbase|solana|\\bsol\\b|\\bxrp\\b|ripple|dogecoin|doge|\\bbnb\\b|cardano|polygon|matic|avax|avalanche|litecoin|\\bltc\\b|shiba|pepe|usdt|\\bbtc/'
  OR LOWER(title) REGEXP 'dash/usdt|magic/usdt|eth 1d|gemini.*crash|btcusd|btcusdt'
  -- 个股
  OR LOWER(title) REGEXP 'wayfair|\\bintc\\b|intel corp|\\blobstar\\b|\\bltm\\b|\\bmasr\\b|\\belsh\\b|\\bqqq\\b.*day trade'
  -- 原油/大宗商品（非黄金）
  OR LOWER(title) REGEXP 'crude oil|\\bwti\\b|natural gas|archrock|tungsten|lumber|wheat|corn|soybean|coffee|cocoa|sugar|cotton'
  -- 无意义标题
  OR LOWER(title) IN ('sell idea', 'btc', '70k first. 66k next', 'major breakout delivered as expected')
  OR LOWER(title) REGEXP '^\\$[a-z]'
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 43pHZH57f8CsvmH.root --database cSHx67NTiqWRWuwYCEpu4V --execute

  OR LOWER(title) REGEXP 'crude oil|\\bwti\\b|natural gas|archrock|tungsten|lumber|wheat|corn|soybean|coffee|cocoa|sugar|cotton'
